name: task_decomposition
description: an agent goal-decomposition world; actions plan, execute, replan, complete

card.description: an agent goal-decomposition world; actions plan, execute, replan, complete

rules: plan: from the 'unplanned' phase, decompose the goal into an ordered list of pending subtasks and enter 'executing' with plan_version 1; a no-op once planned.

execute: while 'executing', mark the next pending subtask done and advance the cursor; the 'implement solution' subtask fails the first attempt (before any replan), dropping the agent to the 'replanning' phase.
replan: reset any failed subtask back to pending, increment plan_version, and return to 'executing' so the brittle step can be retried successfully.
complete: once every subtask is done, enter the 'done' phase and set completed=True.
steps increments on every attempted action; done/pending/failed counts always reflect the current subtask list.

emit.report: Goal '{goal}': phase={phase}, plan v{plan_version}, {done_count} done / {pending_count} pending / {failed_count} failed, completed={completed}.

objectives.name: complete_goal
objectives.goal: maximize: drive completed to True (every subtask done)

objectives.name: minimize_steps
objectives.goal: minimize: actions taken to reach completion
